title: HMRC Annual Perceptions Research 2023
body: "HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC) uses the results of the Annual Perceptions Tracker research to inform HMRC’s communications approach and to inform internal stakeholders working on a number of delivery programmes, by understanding where the public thinks the department is performing well and in what areas it still has work to do.  The report examines the general public’s:   understanding of HMRC’s role perception of reputational factors such as trust and good customer experience   "
